generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control actuators for lighting dimmers modeled within BIM environment, directly linked to physical lighting systems via bidirectional control logic"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingControlAction
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building HVAC actuators for temperature and ventilation control, modeled in BIM and linked to physical HVAC systems for real-time adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HVACControlAction
]

instance AutomatedDoorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated door control system actuators integrated with BIM for bidirectional communication with physical door mechanisms"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AutomatedDoorControl
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors embedded in physical building rooms for occupancy detection, mapped to BIM elements via TwinLight framework"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity probes installed in building rooms, capturing environmental parameters for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataStream
]

instance MotionDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detection sensors in building spaces, configured via TwinLight BIM-centric control framework"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataStream
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy usage meters for building systems, capturing real-time consumption data via BIM-defined endpoints"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance MotionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionDetector
]

instance EnergyConsumptionStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HVACActuator
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingLightingActuator
]

instance AutomatedDoorControl : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AutomatedDoorActuator
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static 3D spatial and functional representation of building components (geometry, topology, relationships) from BIM models"
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata extracted from BIM via model-driven transformations (device IDs, sensor types, control logic)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenTransformation
]

instance BIMControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control logic defined in BIM as part of TwinLight framework for automated commissioning and bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinLightFramework
]

instance SemanticallyEnrichedBIM : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM models bridging static building information with dynamic operational data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status data captured from building occupancy sensors via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Visualization
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental parameters (temperature, humidity) ingested from building sensors for building condition monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Visualization
]

instance MotionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motion detection data from building sensors for occupancy tracking and adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data from building meters for operational optimization and cost analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenTransformation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated transformation of BIM models into operational DT artifacts using Model-Driven Engineering principles"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeMetadataModel, BIMControlLogicModel
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT middleware for real-time data exchange between physical sensors and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OccupancyDataStream, EnvironmentalDataStream, MotionDataStream, EnergyConsumptionStream
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Distributed data store for real-time synchronization between physical building systems and digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:enables OccupancyDataStream, EnvironmentalDataStream, MotionDataStream, EnergyConsumptionStream
]

instance TwinLightFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM-centric control framework automating metadata extraction and bidirectional communication between BIM-defined logic and physical devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMControlLogicModel
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization platform for immersive 3D monitoring of building conditions via DT-generated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables OccupancyData, EnvironmentalData, UnrealEngine5Visualization
]

instance ReinforcementLearning : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AI-based optimization framework for energy and lighting systems using reinforcement learning principles"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building conditions (occupancy, energy usage, environmental parameters) via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides UnrealEngine5Visualization
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of lighting and energy systems using reinforcement learning for energy consumption balancing"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, LightingOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning and bidirectional communication between BIM-defined control logic and physical devices"
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACControlAction, LightingControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance UnrealEngine5Visualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D interactive dashboard showing real-time building conditions (occupancy, energy usage, environmental parameters) for facility management"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "AI-generated recommendations for energy consumption optimization balancing visual comfort and non-visual health effects"
]

instance LightingOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based recommendations for lighting schedules to optimize energy usage while maintaining visual comfort"
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC system parameters (temperature setpoints) based on DT-generated control signals"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of building lighting levels based on occupancy and environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment and Components
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMBuildingModel, OccupancySensor, TemperatureHumiditySensor, MotionDetector, EnergyMeter,
               BuildingLightingActuator, HVACActuator, AutomatedDoorActuator
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment, UnrealEngine5Visualization,
               PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlAutomationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs (e.g., lighting schedules, HVAC adjustments, energy optimization commands) via **standardized extension points** in the modular architecture. These commands are transmitted back to physical actuators through **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** middleware, ensuring bidirectional communication. The framework automates the mapping of virtual control logic (defined in BIM) to physical device configurations, enabling seamless real-time adjustments without manual intervention."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates with real-time synchronization, ensuring live data exchange between physical and virtual assets. The system supports continuous operation with minimal latency, though the exact time-scale specifics (e.g., sub-100ms synchronization) are not explicitly quantified in the documents; the focus is on real-time adaptability and bidirectional data flow."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented ecosystem** with the following components:
  1. **Central DT Framework**: Acts as a hub for bidirectional communication, real-time data processing, and service orchestration.
  2. **BIM-to-Runtime Pipeline**: Automates the transformation of BIM models into deployable DT artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations, control logic).
  3. **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enables real-time data exchange between physical sensors/actuators and DT services.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides immersive 3D interfaces for monitoring and control.
  5. **Service Layer**: Extensible extension points allow DT engineers to integrate custom services (e.g., AI-driven optimization, predictive maintenance) without altering the core framework.
  The constellation ensures **interoperability** via standardized protocols and modular design."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans all life-cycle stages of the building:
  1. **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models define static and dynamic BCS components (e.g., lighting control logic, sensor placements).
  2. **Construction phase**: Automated extraction of device metadata from BIM models for deployment (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations, network endpoints).
  3. **Operation phase**: Real-time synchronization with physical assets via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, enabling adaptive control and predictive maintenance.
  The framework ensures **end-to-end automation** from design to operation, with minimal manual intervention beyond initial BIM modeling and device configuration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Model validation**: Pre-deployment validation of BIM models to detect semantic inconsistencies or missing metadata (e.g., device configurations).
  2. **Real-time synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** ensures low-latency, bidirectional data flow, minimizing drift between physical and virtual states.
  3. **ODTE metric**: Evaluates the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement** to quantify the alignment between DT and physical building, highlighting interoperability and architectural soundness.
  4. **Runtime monitoring**: Continuous validation of control logic and sensor data accuracy via **facility manager interactions** and **DT engineer feedback**.
  The framework addresses **semantic drift** by automating the extraction of runtime semantics from BIM models, reducing manual intervention."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin establishes technical connections via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between the physical asset and the DT. The system relies on standardized protocols for data transmission, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous building systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed via an automated transformation pipeline that processes BIM models into runtime artifacts. The deployment process integrates with Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for real-time data handling, without explicit mention of containerization (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes). The focus is on model-driven automation and standardized extension points for modular deployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with Building Control Systems (BCS) via standardized extension points, enabling seamless communication with non-DT systems (e.g., BCS controllers) and supporting interoperability across AECO workflows. The framework emphasizes modularity to facilitate future integration with external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) without disrupting core functionality."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  1. **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**: Leverages BIM as the semantic backbone for modeling building geometry, topology, and component relationships.
  2. **Industry-Specific Frameworks**: Uses **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** for real-time data exchange, which are open-source and industry-standard middleware solutions.
  3. **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Follows MDE principles for automated transformations and extensibility, ensuring consistency across the DT lifecycle.
  No explicit mention of specific standards like **ISO 12006-2 (IFC)**, **OMG**, or **OMG DTMI** is provided."
]
